headerDescription: Manage how you work, how your credits behave, and how your profile is presented from one focused screen.

management.title: Interface and working rhythm
management.description: Control how the studio behaves: panel position and active guidance while you work.

credits.title: Credits and purchases
credits.description: Your balance, your top-ups, and direct access to Stripe without filler screens.
credits.quickBuyDescription: If you already know the packs, jump straight to checkout from here. If you want to compare first, use the pricing page.
credits.historyDescription: Only completed purchases appear here. No aborted attempts, no extra noise.
credits.referralsDescription: Share your link and track the credits brought by each invited user.

profile.title: Personal details and session
profile.description: Review your active identity and sign out when you need to.

workspace.title: Workspace
workspace.description: Settings that directly affect how the studio moves while you create.

notice.title: Workspace preferences
notice.globalTheme: The application colour theme is now managed globally from Admin to keep the whole product visually consistent.
notice.personalPrefs: Here you can only adjust personal workflow preferences such as panel position and guided assistance while creating.

colors.title: System palette
colors.description: Colours applied only to your session so you can personalise the interface without breaking the shared design system.

interface.panelDescription: Place the main panel where it feels most natural for your workflow.
interface.guidedDescription: Show contextual help step by step while you build a piece.

session.title: Session
session.logoutDescription: Sign out of your current session and return to the access screen.
